Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust;...
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for Emily Hou. Michael Freedman for Cassandra Chen.

Mr. Freedman stated that discovery is ongoing, that they have agreed to mediate the case and do private mediation, and that they expect to conclude mediation within 60 to 90-days. Mr. Vaught stated that he has conducted some mediation. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendment, etc. and the Petition to Determine Validity Third and Fourth Amendments to Trust, etc. were continued to April 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Boncato. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Third And Fourth Amendments To Trust Of Kwei-Sih Chen
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust;...
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Dec-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Cassandra Chen. Jon Vaught for and with Emily Hou.

Counsel requested a continuance stating that they want to do some discovery prior to doing mediation. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendment, etc. and the Petition to Determine Validity of Third and Fourth Amendments to Trust were continued to December 30, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and a referral to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)
